Review_Text: I had a 3 nights in the hotel and overall it was ok to stay. To go to the lobby, you need to climb up stairs first and if you have a luggage with you in hand, I would recommend this hotel. Room was so small and had no space to place my luggage (22inch). Toilet was terrible, opened the door was greeted by cockroaches :(((( They didn't really maintained the room well. But the location was really in the middle of the city, few steps away from the MRT which a bonus for me. If you could put a blind on your eyes as you there just to sleep like me, then you may book here. I wouldn't really recommend for a family to stay. Thank you for the service though.

Review_Text: I booked a room here over two months in advance. I showed up after my flight and when I get there the girl at the desk says this isn't the right place...but call this number and they will come get you. I called a number I had and wrote to them and no response. I asked the girl whats going on she said there are multiple properties under this management and that it happens all the time. I had no idea but I arrived on a time of the largest festival of the year. Every room in town was booked and anything that might be open was going to be double the standard rate. I said so what do I do..there was no answer. I was left high and dry. They still never got back to me..no any apology...not any let us comp you...absolutely nothing. Book with these folks at your own risk
